Name: Rail Yards Market
Description: Rail Yards Market is a vibrant community market held Sundays 10am–2pm, May through October, in Albuquerque’s historic Barelas Rail Yards. We feature 175+ local vendors offering fresh produce, food, and art, plus live music and family fun. We also host special events including a Holiday Market in December and a Valentine Market in February. Free entry, ADA accessible, SNAP/EBT/WIC welcome!
